steps.title: Substitute x = 7 into the function
steps.content:
We have $f(x) = 100x + 5$ and need to find $f(7)$. Replace every $x$ with $7$:
$$f(7) = 100(7) + 5$$

steps.title: Simplify to find the answer
steps.content:
Calculate step by step:
$$100(7) + 5 = 700 + 5 = 705$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
